---
name: Feature Request / Task
about: Define a new feature or sprint task to be added to the project
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

## Feature / Task Description
What does this task cover? What is the requested feature? Explain clearly.

##  Motivation and Use Case
Why do we need this feature? How will it contribute to the project's goal of reducing manual security checks?

##  Proposed Solution and Technical Architecture
How should we approach coding this task? (Which libraries should be used, which files should be modified?)

## Acceptance Criteria (Definition of Done)
What conditions must be met for this task to be considered "Done"?
- [ ] The feature works flawlessly without errors.
- [ ] The code complies with PEP 8 standards.
- [ ] Necessary Pytest unit tests are written.
